product_name: LOLIAS 14K Gold Plated Flat Back Earrings - Hypoallergenic Surgical Stainless Steel Stud Hoop Earrin

caption.full_text: ad23r2 the camera view suddenly changes A woman showcases multiple small, gold-toned hoop and stud earrings, featuring a 14K gold plated finish on her earlobe and cartilage. She stands in front of a light-colored wall and a reddish-brown door, smiling as she presents the jewelry. The dynamic shot suggests either subject movement or a handheld camera.
